response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React/Ember.js, and REST APIs, along with strong database knowledge (SQL, MongoDB). His work on scalable platforms and clean architecture aligns well with the role. However, his lack of recent PostgreSQL and Nest.js experience, and minimal AWS/Kubernetes exposure, slightly reduces his fit. His seniority (Staff/Founder roles) may be overqualified, but his pragmatic approach and learning ability mitigate this concern.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React/Ember.js, and Node.js across multiple industries
Proven track record in building scalable, pragmatic solutions (e.g., Naver, Tencent, open-source Geo-Data platform)
Strong collaboration and knowledge-sharing skills (workshops, talks, mentoring)
concerns: Limited PostgreSQL experience (primary tech stack uses MongoDB, DLang)
No direct Nest.js experience (though backend with Node.js and REST APIs)
Potential overqualification for junior/mid-level role (extensive senior/lead experience)
